title: Wire the unified activity spine
task: In gamma-companion/, create lib/activity.js exporting logActivity(root, {source,origin,tier,model,cost_usd,inflight,action,outcome}) that appends one JSON line to automation/state/gamma-activity.jsonl with a ts field, never throws on write failure (best-effort try/catch), and enforces an OP-22 retention cap (keep the most recent ~5000 lines, prune older). Then call logActivity from gamma-companion/lib/escalate.js#runEscalation (one row at spawn with inflight count, one row at finish with ok/cost_usd read off the SDK result message) and from gamma-companion/lib/approvals.js#resolveApproval (one row per approve/reject). Read cost from the SDK 'result' message total_cost_usd field if present. Do NOT change any trading behavior. Ship with a node smoke that writes+reads 3 rows. Verify: node -e to require lib/activity and assert the file grows.

title: Wire obligations into /api/state
task: In gamma-companion/, add a defensive reader for automation/state/companion-obligations.json (the computed-gaps file: {generated_at, gaps:[{id,label,stale,tier,remediate_skill}]}) using the same null-on-malformed readJSON pattern already in lib/state.js. Merge an 'obligations' key into the object returned by the /api/state handler in server.js so the cockpit can render gap tiles. If the file is missing return obligations:[] (not an error). Do NOT run any skill or sweep here -- this is read-only surfacing only. Verify: node --check server.js, then curl localhost (or a direct call to the state builder) returns an obligations array.

title: Wire the soul into face_brain + realtime instructions
task: Create automation/presence/GAMMA-VOICE.md built on the verified-existing automation/presence/SOUL.md: it carries the three-tier TALK/ESCALATE/PROPOSE boundary and the realtime mouth-only rule ('You are a MOUTH: every substantive turn call ask_gamma and speak its answer verbatim; never state a trading number of your own'). Then in gamma-companion/face/face_brain.py replace the hardcoded SYSTEM string (~line 46) with the loaded contents of GAMMA-VOICE.md (fall back to the old string if the file is missing). Do NOT edit CLAUDE.md or SOUL.md. Verify: python -c imports face_brain and SYSTEM is non-empty; node --check is N/A. This is propose-safe authoring (writes only under automation/presence/ and the companion).

title: Tag origin at the /api/chat boundary
task: In gamma-companion/server.js, at the /api/chat boundary, attach an origin tag ('voice'|'text'|'click') to every escalation request and thread it into runEscalation (escalate.js already accepts {origin} and passes it to makeCanUseTool). Default to 'text' when the client does not specify. Realtime/voice turns coming via the ask_gamma tool path tag 'voice'. This is the hook the guard needs to force voice->propose-only later. Do NOT change guard.js semantics in this step. Verify: node --check server.js and node gamma-companion/smoke-guard.js still passes 14/14.

title: Proactive loop: face narrates obligation gaps
task: In gamma-companion/face/face_brain.py, after loading state, if companion-obligations.json reports any gap with tier 'flag', have the face PREPEND a one-line proactive note in its own voice (e.g. 'Heads up -- premarket did not run; want me to fire Scout?') to its reply. It must only NARRATE -- never auto-fire a skill, never escalate on its own. Read-only deterministic input (the gaps file), free-model output. Do NOT add any scheduler. Verify: python smoke feeding a fake obligations file with one flag gap and asserting the note appears in the reply text.

title: Diagram streaming node-by-node
task: In gamma-companion/, create lib/artifact.js exporting parseArtifact(text) (extracts a single fenced ```gamma-artifact <json>``` block -> {kind,title,svg|...}) and sanitizeSvg(svg) (Node-built-ins only: strip <script>/<foreignObject>/<use>/<animate>, all on* attributes, external+xlink href, css url(), cap ~60KB, degrade to {kind:'text'} on parse anomaly). Run sanitizeSvg in the escalation result pipeline BEFORE the artifact reaches companion-ask-results.jsonl. In public/app.js render the diagram inside a <iframe sandbox> (NO allow-scripts) and give each <g data-node> opacity:0 + a staggered @keyframes nodeIn driven by style='--i:N' so the diagram assembles node-by-node. Do NOT inject untrusted SVG into the main DOM. Verify: node --check, a unit test of sanitizeSvg stripping a <script>, and the iframe is sandboxed.

title: Build-task/checklist store with threaded ids
task: In gamma-companion/, create lib/buildtasks.js (sibling to approvals.js) owning automation/state/companion-build-tasks.json ({builds:[{build_id,tasks:[{task_id,text,status,node?,ask_id?}]}]}) + append-only automation/state/companion-build-events.jsonl. Expose getBuilds(root), addBuild(root,{build_id,tasks}), setTaskStatus(root,task_id,status). Serve GET /api/build-tasks and mutate via POST /api/build-task in server.js. Thread build_id/task_id end-to-end: the free-face clarify loop mints them on J-confirm; they ride face->logAsk->runEscalation->the result record (extend appendResult in escalate.js to carry build_id/task_id); on ok, setTaskStatus(task_id,'done') on EXACT match, no match -> leave + log to companion-build-events.jsonl (fail-visible). Verify: node --check + a smoke that adds a build, marks a task done by id, and asserts persistence + a no-match logs an event.
